teachingHero.title: Come teach with us
teachingHero.description: Become an instructor and change lives — including your own

aiFluency.title: Scale AI fluency across your organization
aiFluency.description: Our new AI Packages help employees at all levels understand, communicate about, and implement AI solutions with confidence and ethical awareness.

skills.title: Learn essential career and life skills
skills.description: Hogwarts helps you build in-demand skills fast and advance your career in a changing job market.

curriculum.title: Expand curriculum
curriculum.description: Arts of learning with enchanting courses crafted by the finest wizards in education.
curriculum.feature1Desc: Curated courses from industry leaders and top universities.
curriculum.feature2Desc: Hands-on projects to practice skills and stand out to employers.
curriculum.feature3Desc: Build job confidence and hone skills in high-growth fields.
curriculum.feature4Desc: Seamlessly connect courses to your learning management system.

howToBegin.title: How to begin
howToBegin.description1: You start with your passion and knowledge. Then choose a promising topic with the help of our Marketplace Insights tool.
howToBegin.description2: Use basic tools like a smartphone or a DSLR camera. Add a good microphone and you're ready to start.
howToBegin.description3: Gather your first ratings and reviews by promoting your course through social media and your professional networks.
howToBegin.tip1: The way that you teach — what you bring to it — is up to you.
howToBegin.tip2: If you don't like being on camera, just capture your screen. Either way, we can help you produce your first course.
howToBegin.tip3: Your course will be discoverable in our marketplace where you earn revenue from each paid enrollment.
howToBegin.helpText1: We offer plenty of resources on how to create your first course. And, our instructor dashboard and curriculum pages help keep you organized.
howToBegin.helpText2: We provide production guidelines, course management features, and support from our Trust & Safety team.
howToBegin.helpText3: Our custom coupon tool lets you offer enrollment incentives while our global promotions drive traffic to courses.

reasons.title: So many reasons to start
reasons.description1: Publish the course you want, in the way you want, and always have control of your own content.
reasons.description2: Teach what you know and help learners explore their interests, gain new skills, and advance their careers.
reasons.description3: Expand your professional network, build your expertise, and earn money on each paid enrollment.

descriptions.addVideo: Provide the video URL and details. Your video will be reviewed before going live.
descriptions.confirm: Review your submission. You retain full ownership and control over your video.

teachVideos.title: My Videos
teachVideos.emptyNone: You haven't uploaded any videos yet.
teachVideos.emptyHint: Use the "Propose a Video" button from your dashboard.
teachVideos.ownershipNote: You retain full ownership of all your videos. Use the settings button to manage visibility or delete.

videoReview.platformHint: Public and paid videos are approved by the platform catalog team. You can still reject.

videoSettings.paywallDescription: This is a paid video. Removing the paywall makes it free at the audience you choose. Existing buyers are not refunded.
videoSettings.visibilityNote: You can change visibility at any time. Your video, your choice.
videoSettings.publicResubmitNote: Making an approved video public resubmits it for platform review.
videoSettings.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete “{title}” and remove it from the lesson. This action cannot be undone.
videoSettings.ownershipBody: You retain all rights. The platform only displays your video while visibility is non-private. You can revoke access or delete at any time.
videoSettings.toastResubmitted: Set to public — resubmitted for platform review
videoSettings.toastRevoked: Access revoked — video is now private
